subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1919-12-15
subcodes.first_line: The rich must aid the poor. There was a person in America who was worth about three hundred million liras. Nevertheless, he was unwilling to spend even one lira on the poor; and all his life, he had not experienced comfort
subcodes.first_line_orig: اغنیا باید به فقرا کمک کنند در آمریکا شخصی بود قریب سیصد ملیون لیره ثروت داشت
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @greed; envy; covetousness; attachment to the world, @assistance to the poor and lowly; the orphan; the sick, @charitable associations; humanitarian activities, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty
